title: Editor & Open VSX
summary: VS Code extension defaults to a **bundled LSP** (cargo launch gated behind devMode). **Open VSX** automation on `main`: workflow scaffold, semver derivation from tags/commits, namespace bootstrap, PAT/token submodule checkout for private **pckg**, VSCE icon compatibility, and publish retries — deliverable **v01-open-vsx** closes on superrepo **v0.1.0** (`f777b79`).
